urls.title: URLs or Domains
urls.description: List of website URLs or domain names to scrape contact info from.

emailLimit.title: Max Emails per Domain
emailLimit.description: Maximum number of emails to return per domain.

phoneLimit.title: Max Phones per Domain
phoneLimit.description: Maximum number of phone numbers to return per domain.

filterPersonalEmails.title: Filter Personal Emails
filterPersonalEmails.description: If true, excludes emails from Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail, etc.

realtime.title: Realtime Mode
realtime.description: If true, skips SkyMem lookup and scrapes directly from the website.
